findings.competitors_citation: Q32 Bio (Nasdaq: QTTB) reports financial results.
findings.keywords_citation: Q32 is developing bempikibart (ADX-914), a dual inhibitor of IL-21 and BAFF.
findings.summary: Q32 Bio reported its Q1 2026 financial results and provided a corporate update, highlighting progress in its clinical-stage pipeline, including the dual BAFF/IL-21 inhibitor bempikibart.
findings.summary_citation: Q32 Bio Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Q32 Bio IR, May 5, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: Xencor, Inc. (XNCR) provided a corporate update.
findings.keywords_citation: Xencor is developing XmAb942, an IL-17/IL-23 inhibitor.
findings.summary: Xencor furnished a corporate presentation current as of May 5, 2026, and hosted a webcast to discuss clinical data for XmAb942 (an IL-17 x IL-23 bispecific) and XmAb412 presented at DDW.

findings.competitors_citation: No competitor from the list mentioned.
findings.keywords_citation: Study evaluating treatment for patients with COPD.
findings.summary: Altesa BioSciences enrolled the first patient in its Phase 2b CARDINAL clinical trial of vapendavir, an oral antiviral being studied as a treatment for COPD exacerbations triggered by rhinovirus.
findings.summary_citation: Altesa BioSciences Enrolls First Patient in Phase 2b CARDINAL Clinical Trial, PR Newswire, May 5, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: No competitor from the list mentioned.
findings.keywords_citation: Research focusing on the IL-7 receptor (IL-7R).
findings.summary: A scientific publication in PNAS explores the structural mechanisms of IL-7R dimerization and identifies ways to reverse oncogenic transmembrane mutations through rational design, offering insights for IL-7R-targeted therapies.
findings.summary_citation: Structural rewiring of IL-7R dimerization by an oncogenic transmembrane mutation, PNAS, Vol. 123 No. 18, May 5, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: No competitor from the list mentioned.
findings.summary: A study published in Nature Communications describes how the host IL-17-DUOX2 axis regulates the gastrointestinal colonization of Candida albicans.
findings.summary_citation: An IL-17-DUOX2 axis controls gastrointestinal colonization, Nature Communications, May 5, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: No competitor from the list mentioned.
findings.keywords_citation: Research on systemic sclerosis-interstitial lung disease (SSc-ILD).
findings.summary: An article in Frontiers in Immunology investigates the role of monocyte-derived TREM2 macrophages in promoting lung fibrosis in patients with systemic sclerosis-interstitial lung disease (SSc-ILD).
findings.summary_citation: CD14+CD16+ monocyte-derived TREM2 macrophages promote lung fibrosis in SSc-ILD, Frontiers in Immunology, May 5, 2026

findings.competitors_citation: UCB is buying Candid Therapeutics for up to $2.2 Billion.
findings.keywords_citation: Candid Therapeutics is focused on T-cell engagers for autoimmune diseases including HS.
findings.summary: UCB announced a definitive agreement to acquire Candid Therapeutics for up to $2.2 billion. Candid is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing bispecific T-cell engagers for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, with a pipeline including candidates for Hidradenitis Suppurativa.
findings.summary_citation: Five things for pharma marketers to know for Tuesday, May 5, 2026, MMM Online
